W1 495(a), AW 25 BYAd, 2013 MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMAT CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th October, 2014 $.0. 2721(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (2) of Section 38L of the Wildlife (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby appoints the following members to the National Tiger Conservation Authority for the period specified against their names with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and for that purpose makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number S. O. 1403(E), dated the 4th September, 2006, namely : In the said notification, for scrial numbers 3 and 4 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— e Shri Rajiv Pratap Rudy -Member Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) _ He shall hold office up to 20™ September, 2015 or till he ceases to be a Member of Lok Sabha, whichever is carlier. 4 Shri Nagendea Singh -Member | Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) _Tie shail hvid office up to 20° September, 2015 or till he ceases tobe 2 | . Member of Lok Sabha, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 15-25/2009-NTCA] Dr. RAJESH GOPAL, Addl. Director General of Forests (Project Tiger) Note: The principal notification constituting the National Tiger Conservation Authority was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide notification number S. O. 1403(E), dated the 4th September, 2006 and subsequently amended as follows :— 1. S.0.1889(E), dated the 2nd November, 2006 3. S.0.981(E), dated the 13th June, 2007 3. No. 15-25/2009-NTCA—Published in the Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part Ill-Section 4 dated the 4th September, 2009; 4. No. 15-25/2000-NTCA—Published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part Ill-Section 4 dated the 17th September, 2010; 5. S.0.1440(E), datcd the 21st June, 2011 S.0. 2276(E), dated the 21st Scptember, 2012; and $.0. 495(E), dated the 25th February, 2013 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064and Published by the Controller of Publications, Defhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
